PISHOCKTHESPIRE2-PISHOCK_COLLAR.descript:
At the start of each combat, add [blue]{Cards}[/blue] [gold]{Cards:plural:Safeword|Safewords}[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
[red]Unblocked damage[/red] triggers an electric discharge.
PISHOCKTHESPIRE2-PISHOCK_COLLAR.flavor: You were not supposed to wear this by your own will.
PISHOCKTHESPIRE2-PISHOCK_COLLAR.title: PiShock Collar
